metadata.description: Public Claude Code plugins — conventional commits, code review, AI image generation, large codebase search, and persistent knowledge management

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Write conventional commits automatically. Stages changes, analyzes the diff, and crafts a Conventional Commits message with the right type, scope, and summary.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Review code for correctness, security, performance, and style. Works on staged diffs, individual files, or GitHub PRs. Returns structured findings with P0-P3 severity levels.

plugins.name: image-gen
plugins.description: AI image generation with expert prompt engineering. Supports fal.ai, Together AI, Replicate, OpenAI, Stability AI via API, and Higgsfield Nano Banana Pro / Google Gemini via browser automation.

plugins.name: agent-repo-search
plugins.description: Efficiently search and ingest large codebases using structural indexing and token-aware CXML chunking.

plugins.name: search
plugins.description: Precise codebase exploration using ripgrep and tree-sitter. Finds definitions, call sites, and usages with structural awareness.

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Long-term memory management using the Memory Palace (MemPalace) pattern. Persists project facts, user preferences, and session snapshots.

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: BMAD Project Manager — orchestrates software projects through the full BMAD lifecycle: Ideation → PRD → Architecture → Stories → Implementation → QA → Integration.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Persistent markdown wiki maintenance — INGEST sources, QUERY with citations, LINT for drift, LEARNINGS capture. Vault at ~/knowledge-base/. Includes kb-to-wiki skill for publishing the KB as a browsable HTML wiki.

plugins.name: setup-telemetry
plugins.description: Instrument Claude with Langfuse telemetry and local dashboard. Visualizes session metrics, tool usage, and performance insights.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research a topic via AutoResearchClaw (full 23-stage pipeline → paper) or Regular Research (fast Claude synthesis).

plugins.name: cc-lens
plugins.description: Token usage intelligence for Claude Code — analyze session costs, identify waste categories (tool hammering, context bloat, cache inefficiency), and generate forensics HTML reports with actionable recommendations.

plugins.name: token-efficiency
plugins.description: Industry-standard knowledge base for LLM token efficiency — context window cost model, waste taxonomy (9 categories), caching architecture, prompt engineering guidelines, and optimization playbook ranked by ROI.
